On May 20, 2025, Google quietly rewired its entire search system — shifting toward AI-driven ranking and response generation. Overnight, thousands of websites that once ranked well dropped off the map. That’s where we come in.  At JAC Consulting SEO Blueprint, we help business owners thrive in this new AI-powered landscape. With over two decades in digital marketing, we’ve seen every shift — from keyword stuffing to website cloning to mobile-first indexing to the rise of entity-based AI search.  Our 6-Month Done-For-You Blueprint ~ complete with content ~ is built to make your website visible again:  This is daily step by step guide with a content driven purpose to put your website at the top of AI and other search engines.  What else we deliver a detailed and actionable website SEO Audit. A 30 to 50 list of relevant keywords to boost your presence with geography supplement.  All for just $250 — a fraction of what agencies charge. NOT $250 a month. just a 1 time fee of $250  We don’t sell fluff. We deliver visibility that converts.
